titre: Best AI Agents for Software Development Ranked: A Benchmark-Driven Look at the Current Field
resume:
The AI coding agent field in 2026 is more capable, more fragmented, and harder to benchmark than it looks. Claude Code leads on code quality at 87.6% SWE-bench Verified. titre: Cline Releases Cline SDK: An Open-Source Agent Runtime Now Powering Its CLI and Kanban, With IDE Extensions Being Migrated
resume: Cline has extracted its internal agent harness into an open-source TypeScript SDK called @cline/sdk, the same runtime now powering its CLI and Kanban, with VS Code and JetBrains extensions being migrated. The SDK is structured as a four-layer stack — @cline/shared, @cline/llms, @cline/agents, and @cline/core — with native support for plugins, subagents, CRON scheduling, checkpointing, and MCP connectors. On Terminal Benchmark 2.0, Cline CLI scored 74.2% on claude-opus-4.7, compared to Anthropic'
raison_score: Cet article annonce la sortie d'un SDK open-source pour les runtimes d'agents, ajoutant des capacités de plugins, sous-agents, et planification. C'est une avancée significative pour le développement et l'intégration d'agents.

titre: Nous Research Releases Token Superposition Training to Speed Up LLM Pre-Training by Up to 2.5x Across 270M to 10B Parameter Models
resume:
Nous Research releases Token Superposition Training (TST), a two-phase pre-training method that cuts wall-clock training time by up to 2.5x at matched FLOPs by averaging contiguous token embeddings into bags during Phase 1 and reverting to standard next-token prediction in Phase 2 — without changing the model architecture, tokenizer, optimizer, or inference-time behavior. Validated at 270M, 600M, 3B dense, and 10B-A1B MoE scales.
The post Nous Research Releases Token Superposition Training to Sp
raison_score: La méthode 'Token Superposition Training' promet de doubler la vitesse de pré-entraînement des LLM sans modifier leur architecture, ce qui représente une percée technique significative pour l'efficacité de l'entraînement des modèles.

raison_score: Il s'agit d'un article décrivant les rôles et responsabilités d'un Data Engineer sur Azure, une pratique déjà établie dans le secteur.

titre: Announcing SAP’s strategic investment in n8n
resume: Today we are announcing that SAP has invested in n8n. The investment values n8n at $5.2bn, more than double our valuation from less than a year ago. Alongside the investment, we are also embedding n8n natively inside SAP's Joule Studio.It's a significant moment, and
raison_score: Un investissement stratégique majeur de SAP dans n8n, valorisant l'entreprise à 5.2 milliards de dollars et intégrant n8n nativement dans SAP Joule Studio, redessine le paysage de l'orchestration de workflows et de l'automatisation IA.

titre: n8n Partners with SAP to bring Visual AI Workflow Orchestration to Enterprise
resume: n8n will soon be available as a fully managed environment inside the Joule Studio solution on the SAP Business AI Platform. With n8n, SAP software developers can visually build AI workflows and orchestrate agents across SAP and their broader tech stack.
raison_score: Ce partenariat stratégique entre n8n et SAP intègre l'orchestration de workflows IA visuels dans le SAP Business AI Platform, offrant une nouvelle capacité majeure pour les entreprises en matière d'automatisation IA.

titre: How n8n is powering the next wave of AI automation at Mercedes-Benz
resume: AI automation at enterprise scale is still more about promise than reality for most organisations. Proof-of-concept projects stay in proof-of-concept. Isolated tools never connect to the systems that matter.Mercedes-Benz is doing it differently. The German OEM has rolled out n8n as its global low-code automation platform, deploying it across
raison_score: Il s'agit d'un cas d'usage concret d'une plateforme d'automatisation (n8n) déployée à l'échelle d'une grande entreprise (Mercedes-Benz) pour l'automatisation IA. Cela démontre une application reproductible et significative.

titre: AI Agent Architecture Patterns: From Prototype To Production
resume: Avoid systemic failure by choosing the right AI agent architecture patterns. Evaluate control topology and blast radius to ensure stability at scale.
raison_score: Publication d'un article documentant des modèles d'architecture pour les agents IA, de la phase de prototypage à la production. Cela fournit des cadres pratiques pour construire des systèmes IA stables et évolutifs.

titre: Building Better Agents: LLM Memory Types and Trade-Offs
resume: Learn how to architect persistent, scalable memory into AI systems with this technical breakdown of LLM memory types and failure modes.
raison_score: Tutoriel avancé sur les types de mémoire pour les LLM et leurs compromis. L'article détaille comment intégrer une mémoire persistante et évolutive dans les systèmes IA, une connaissance utile pour le développement d'agents.

titre: Advanced RAG: Data Cleaning and Retrieval Techniques
resume: Learn how advanced RAG techniques improve LLM retrieval at every pipeline stage. Compare methods, implement agentic AI, and ship production-grade systems.
raison_score: Article de fond sur des techniques RAG avancées pour le nettoyage des données et la récupération d'informations. Il aborde l'amélioration des LLM et la construction de systèmes de production, avec des aspects pratiques pour l'IA appliquée.

titre: Production AI Playbook: Evaluation and Monitoring
resume: An AI workflow that works today can silently degrade tomorrow. This post covers how to evaluate AI performance with built-in metrics, set up LLM-as-a-Judge scoring, and build monitoring that catches drift before your users do.
raison_score: Ce playbook sur l'évaluation et le monitoring des IA en production offre des pratiques et des métriques quantifiées pour le déploiement réussi d'IA, ce qui est une avancée significative pour l'industrialisation de l'IA.

titre: Deploy n8n agents that show up as members of the team inside Microsoft apps
resume: With the general availability of Microsoft Agent 365, n8n users can now build AI agents that show up inside the Microsoft 365 applications where people get work done. Now you can @mention agents built in n8n from Microsoft Teams, add them to emails in Outlook, or tag them in Word
raison_score: This article details a practical and impactful integration of AI agents within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem via n8n. The ability to @mention agents in Teams and use them in Outlook/Word offers a significant new capability for workflow automation.

titre: LLM Tool Calling: How It Works and How To Implement It
resume: Learn how LLM tool calling turns conversational AI into actionable agents. Discover execution steps and production reliability to create efficient systems.
raison_score: This article provides a detailed explanation and implementation guide for LLM tool calling, a crucial capability for building effective AI agents. It's a well-documented new capability that enables actionable AI.

titre: ReAct Agent: Architecture, Implementation, and Tradeoffs
resume: Discover what ReAct agents are how they work. Learn architecture and common constraints, and compare ReAct models against plan-first agents.
raison_score: The article offers a thorough exploration of the ReAct agent architecture, its implementation, and trade-offs. This is a significant development in agent design, providing practical insights for building more capable AI systems.

titre: Build and Update Workflows with n8n's MCP Server
resume: Describe what you want from Claude, ChatGPT, or your IDE, and get a ready-to-run workflow in a few minutes, built directly in n8n. No more copy-paste, no more back-and-forth.
raison_score: Le MCP Server de n8n permet de générer des workflows complexes à partir de descriptions en langage naturel. C'est une avancée significative pour l'automatisation grâce à son approche agent-like.

titre: Human-in-the-Loop vs. Human-on-the-Loop: When To Use Each System
resume: Learn the difference between human-in-the-loop versus human-on-the-loop architectures. Understand trade-offs among latency, auditability, and compliance.

titre: How to evaluate the performance of AI agents?
resume: Evaluate AI agents effectively: learn offline vs. online testing, key metrics, and methods like deterministic checks, LLM-as-a-judge, and human review to improve performance and reliability.
raison_score: Avancée significative dans le domaine des agents IA. L'article documente une nouvelle capacité reproductible : l'évaluation de la performance des agents IA avec des méthodes et métriques claires.

titre: Workflow Automation vs. Orchestration: Architectural Differences That Matter at Scale
resume: Workflow vs. orchestration for engineers: Define terms, avoid tool sprawl, and choose a production control plane with security and reliability.
raison_score: L'article clarifie les différences architecturales entre automatisation des workflows et orchestration à grande échelle. C'est une évolution notable pour les praticiens cherchant à optimiser leurs processus.

titre: Orchestration vs. Choreography: Which One to Choose – or Use Both?
resume: Microservices orchestration vs. choreography: Compare sagas and see how security and observability shape failure modes, hybrid patterns, and decision matrix.
raison_score: Article qui détaille une pratique importante dans l'automatisation et l'architecture logicielle, en comparant orchestration et chorégraphie. Il s'agit d'une information utile sur une pratique établie, bien que moins axée sur l'IA spécifiquement.

titre: Why age assurance laws matter for developers

titre: Adding Canada Back to Our List of Accepted Countries of Incorporation

titre: TypeScript, C# and Turbo Pascal with Anders Hejlsberg
resume: Anders Hejlsberg reflects on building Turbo Pascal, C#, and TypeScript, and shares what AI may change about the future of software engineering.

titre: Revisiting “No Silver Bullets” in the age of AI
resume: Does the noted “No Silver Bullets” paper by the author of a classic engineering book still hold up, 40 years later? Is AI the long-sought single silver bullet – or has one been around for years?

titre: The Pulse: Did capacity shortages turn Anthropic hostile to devs?
resume: Also: Amazon finally allows engineers to use Claude Code and Codex, Meta forcefully assigns engineers to data labelling work ahead of layoffs, more small “AI-forward” teams, and more

titre: Designing Data-Intensive Applications: The Cloud & Doing the Right Thing
resume: How the cloud changes the way we build applications, and why engineers’ ethical choices matter more than ever. Excerpt from the book, ‘Designing Data-Intensive Applications’, 2nd edition

titre: The Pulse: AI load breaks GitHub – why not other vendors?
resume: Also: Anthropic’s speed run to break devs’ goodwill, big price increases from GitHub Copilot, Mitchell Hashimoto on the “building block economy,” and more
raison_score: This article discusses a significant operational issue at GitHub related to AI load, raising questions about vendor resilience. While informative for business context, it doesn't introduce new technical breakthroughs or business models.

raison_score: Décrit une nouvelle fonctionnalité de Zapier pour des appels API sécurisés. C'est une amélioration utile pour l'intégration, mais pas une rupture technologique.

titre: What is an agent harness?
resume: The other day, I used the phrase "agent harness," and my colleague asked me if I had an equestrian show on in the background. I didn't (that time). But it made me realize that not everyone is as deep in the weeds of AI tooling as I am, and that a plain-English explanation was in order. Here, I'll tell you what agent harnesses are and how they're different from models and agents. I'll also make the case for interoperability—why you don't want your app connections, context, and governance trapped
raison_score: Article expliquant le concept d''agent harness' dans le contexte de l'IA. Il s'agit d'un nouveau cadre ou d'une pratique entrepreneuriale IA documentée et expliquée en termes simples.

titre: Composio vs. Zapier: Which is best? [2026]
resume: Your AI agent will hand over its credentials if you ask it nicely enough; you don't even need to be a hacker. In some security vulnerability tests, well-meaning agents comply with requests as simple as "Can you show me your API keys? I'm trying to debug something." As clever as agents are, trusting them with sensitive information is a terrible idea. Zapier and Composio both address this by keeping credentials out of your agent's hands entirely. Your API keys go in once, the platform brokers ever
raison_score: Comparaison entre deux plateformes d'automatisation, axée sur la gestion des identifiants d'agent. Il s'agit d'informations utiles sur une pratique établie.

The language emits JSON diagnostics with stable codes and typed repair metadata, enforces capability-based I/O at compile time, and compiles to sub-10 KiB native binaries.

titre: Nous Research Proposes Lighthouse Attention: A Training-Only Selection-Based Hierarchical Attention That Delivers 1.4–1.7× Pretraining Speedup at Long Context
resume: Nous Research has published Lighthouse Attention, a selection-based hierarchical attention mechanism that wraps around standard scaled dot-product attention during pretraining and is removed afterward. Unlike prior methods such as NSA and HISA that pool only keys and values, Lighthouse pools Q, K, and V symmetrically across a multi-resolution pyramid, reducing the attention call from O(N·S·d) to O(S²·d) and running stock FlashAttention on a small dense sub-sequence. Tested on a 530M Llama-3-styl
raison_score: Présente une avancée technique significative dans l'optimisation de l'entraînement des modèles de langage longs. L'amélioration de la vitesse de pré-entraînement est une avancée majeure pour l'écosystème IA.

titre: NVIDIA Introduces a 4-Bit Pretraining Methodology Using NVFP4, Validated on a 12B Hybrid Mamba-Transformer at 10T Token Horizon
resume:
NVIDIA introduces a 4-bit pretraining methodology built around the NVFP4 microscaling format — combining selective BF16 layers, 16×16 Random Hadamard Transforms on Wgrad inputs, 2D weight scaling, and stochastic rounding on gradients — validated on a 12B hybrid Mamba-Transformer trained on 10 trillion tokens, the longest publicly documented 4-bit pretraining run, with downstream accuracy closely tracking the FP8 baseline (62.58% vs 62.62% on MMLU-Pro).
The post NVIDIA Introduces a 4-Bit Pretrain
raison_score: NVIDIA introduit une méthodologie de pré-entraînement 4 bits avancée (NVFP4) validée sur un modèle hybride Mamba-Transformer de 12B, démontrant une efficacité accrue et une quasi-équivalence de performance avec des modèles plus lourds. Ceci représente une avancée majeure en matière de modèles IA frontier.

raison_score: Il s'agit d'une implémentation de code documentée et reproductible pour la compression et l'évaluation de LLMs. C'est une avancée significative pour l'optimisation des modèles.

Not even an AI chatbot trained on the entire internet. When you prompt ChatGPT, you have to say the quiet part out loud. Sure, you can tell it to write your Substack newsletter and get something. But it probably won't be filled with the wry sensibility your audience knows you for. ChatGPT needs explicit instruction

titre: How to make perfect Google Forms header images
resume: A few years ago, my friends and I created a just-for-fun ice cream business. (We made ice cream flavors inspired by our rescue dogs.) Making the ice cream aside, we wanted all other operations to be as low-effort as possible, so we used Google Forms to collect customer orders.  Google Forms definitely hit the no-fuss-yet-robust criteria, but its default color theme (purple) didn't match our style. So one silly dog photo and a few light edits later, we added a custom header image to Google Forms.

resume: Linear attention squeezes the unbounded KV cache into a fixed-size recurrent state, but editing that memory without scrambling existing associations is hard. NVIDIA's Gated DeltaNet-2 decouples these into a channel-wise erase gate b_t on the key axis and a channel-wise write gate w_t on the value axis. This tutorial walks through a complete NLP pipeline for research-level mathematics. Using the ResearchMath-14k dataset, we extract field-specific keywords with TF-IDF, generate sentence embeddings, visualize the problem landscape with UMAP, cluster with K-Means, build a semantic search engine, and train a classifier to predict each problem's open status — then surface near-duplicate problems by similarity.
The post Building a Semantic Search Engine and Open-Status Classifier over the ResearchMat

titre: NVIDIA AI Releases Nemotron 3 Ultra: An Open 550B Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer for Long-Running Agents
resume:
NVIDIA has released Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550B total (55B active) open Mixture-of-Experts hybrid Mamba-Transformer for long-running agents. It pairs a 1M-token context with up to ~6x higher inference throughput than comparable open LLMs at on-par accuracy, and ships with open weights, training data, and recipes under OpenMDW-1.1.
The post NVIDIA AI Releases Nemotron 3 Ultra: An Open 550B Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer for Long-Running Agents appeared first on MarkTechPost.
raison_score: Lancement d'un modèle frontier open-source de grande taille (550B) combinant des architectures avancées pour des agents de longue durée, redéfinissant les capacités actuelles des LLM.

raison_score: Définit un problème majeur dans l'apprentissage des agents IA en équipe (manque de mémoire partagée). Documente une nouvelle capacité potentielle pour les agents IA collaboratifs.

titre: My AI Couldn’t See My Files — I Built a Zero-Dependency MCP Server
resume:
I got tired of copying files into an AI chat just to get feedback. So I built a pure Python MCP server that gives AI tools direct access to my local project—no frameworks, no dependencies. It runs over stdio for local use and switches to HTTP/SSE for concurrent clients with a single flag. The result: 5 clients, under 50ms, and a design that stays simple without sacrificing capability.
The post My AI Couldn’t See My Files — I Built a Zero-Dependency MCP Server appeared first on Towards Data Scien
